description: individuals, agents, models, patterns. Self-service mirror for engineers; team-health view for managers.

panels.description:
Cost share by model family over time — watch for expensive models displacing cheaper ones on routine work.
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  CASE
    WHEN tl.model LIKE '%fable%' THEN 'Fable'
    WHEN tl.model LIKE '%opus%' THEN 'Opus'
    WHEN tl.model LIKE '%sonnet%' THEN 'Sonnet'
    WHEN tl.model LIKE '%haiku%' THEN 'Haiku'
    ELSE COALESCE(tl.model,'unknown')
  END AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 4) AS cost_usd
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp)
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY 1, metric
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Model Mix Over Time

panels.description:
Fable/Opus cost on work-type=docs or test, as % of all Fable/Opus cost. High values are a model-fit review prompt — not a verdict.
scope: attributed spend (cost_facts + entity_tags_resolved + fractional weighting per A2)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN (cf.model LIKE '%opus%' OR cf.model LIKE '%fable%')
                       AND x.tag_value IN ('docs','test') THEN cf.cost_usd * COALESCE(x.w, 1) ELSE 0 END)
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.model LIKE '%opus%' OR cf.model LIKE '%fable%' THEN cf.cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 0),
  1) AS `Premium on Routine %`
FROM cost_facts cf
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er
  JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id AND t.tag_key = 'work-type'
) x ON x.entity_type = cf.entity_type AND x.entity_id = cf.entity_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cf.timestamp)

panels.title: Premium Model on Routine Work

panels.description:
Cost heat matrix: model family x work-type. Fable/Opus on docs or test is a model-fit review prompt.
scope: attributed spend (cost_facts + entity_tags_resolved + fractional weighting per A2)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN cf.model LIKE '%fable%' THEN 'Fable'
    WHEN cf.model LIKE '%opus%' THEN 'Opus'
    WHEN cf.model LIKE '%sonnet%' THEN 'Sonnet'
    WHEN cf.model LIKE '%haiku%' THEN 'Haiku'
    ELSE COALESCE(cf.model, 'unknown')
  END AS model_family,
  COALESCE(x.tag_value, IF(cf.entity_type = '', '(unallocated)', '(untagged)')) AS work_type,
  ROUND(SUM(cf.cost_usd * COALESCE(x.w, 1)), 2) AS cost
FROM cost_facts cf
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT er.entity_type, er.entity_id, t.tag_value,
         1.0 / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY er.entity_type, er.entity_id) AS w
  FROM entity_tags_resolved er
  JOIN tags t ON t.id = er.tag_id AND t.tag_key = 'work-type'
) x ON x.entity_type = cf.entity_type AND x.entity_id = cf.entity_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cf.timestamp)
GROUP BY model_family, work_type
ORDER BY model_family, work_type

panels.title: Model x Work-Type Cost Matrix

panels.description:
Spend per engineer per day over the window. Engineer = token_ledger.username; '' on legacy rows shown as (unstamped).
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(tl.username, ''), '(unstamped)') AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 4) AS cost_usd
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp)
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY 1, metric
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Spend by Engineer, daily

panels.description:
Lead cost vs teammate cost per day. >80% lead share = 'lead does everything' anti-pattern (Eight Rules violation).
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(tl.agent_name,'') = '' THEN 'lead' ELSE 'teammates' END AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 4) AS cost_usd
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp)
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY 1, metric
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Lead vs Teammates Cost, daily

panels.description:
Lead share of total cost in window. >80% = anti-pattern. Review signal, not a verdict.
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tl.agent_name,'') = '' THEN tl.cost_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 0), 1) AS `Lead Cost %`
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp)
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))

panels.title: Lead Agent Workshare

panels.description:
Lead cost share over the trailing 14 days, daily. Trend direction matters more than absolute value.
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  'lead_share' AS metric,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tl.agent_name,'') = '' THEN tl.cost_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(tl.cost_usd), 0), 1) AS `lead_share_pct`
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE tl.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Lead Workshare Trend

panels.description:
Distinct named agents (teammates, excluding lead) active per day based on token_ledger messages.
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  'active_agents' AS metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT tl.agent_name) AS `distinct_agents`
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp)
  AND tl.agent_name != ''
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Distinct Active Agents / Day

panels.description:
Daily count of distinct sessions in the ledger.
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  'sessions' AS metric,
  COUNT(DISTINCT tl.session_id) AS `sessions`
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp)
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Sessions / Day

panels.description:
Total tool calls from teammates per day. Proxy for agent-to-agent coordination volume.
scope: immediate ledger (attribution pending)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(tl.timestamp, $agg),
  'teammate_tools' AS metric,
  SUM(tl.n_tool_use) AS `tool_calls`
FROM token_ledger tl
WHERE $__timeFilter(tl.timestamp)
  AND tl.agent_name != ''
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Teammate Tool Calls / Day

panels.description:
WMS entity status transitions per day by target status.
scope: WMS journal (all entity types)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(wj.created_at, $agg),
  CAST(wj.new_value AS CHAR) AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS transitions
FROM wms_journal wj
WHERE wj.field = 'status'
  AND $__timeFilter(wj.created_at)
GROUP BY 1, metric
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Status Transitions / Day

panels.description:
WorkUnit cycle time: average and max hours from first state interval to done, grouped by completion day.
scope: WMS v2 workunits

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(wi_done.started_at, $agg),
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, wi_first.first_seen, wi_done.started_at) / 3600.0), 2) AS `avg_hours`,
  ROUND(MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, wi_first.first_seen, wi_done.started_at) / 3600.0), 2) AS `max_hours`
FROM wms_intervals wi_done
JOIN (
  SELECT entity_id, MIN(started_at) AS first_seen
  FROM wms_intervals
  WHERE kind = 'state' AND entity_type = 'workunit'
  GROUP BY entity_id
) wi_first ON wi_first.entity_id = wi_done.entity_id
WHERE wi_done.kind = 'state'
  AND wi_done.entity_type = 'workunit'
  AND wi_done.state = 'done'
  AND wi_done.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: WorkUnit Cycle Time (hours)

panels.description:
Outcomes reaching done status per day.
scope: WMS v2 outcomes

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(wi.started_at, $agg),
  'completed' AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS `outcomes_completed`
FROM wms_intervals wi
WHERE wi.kind = 'state'
  AND wi.entity_type = 'outcome'
  AND wi.state = 'done'
  AND wi.started_at >= $__timeFrom()
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Outcomes Completed / Day

panels.description:
Active and review-state workunits open longer than 24 hours. Actionable stalls — check focus and agent assignment.
scope: WMS v2 workunits (open state intervals)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  wi.entity_id AS id,
  w.title,
  wi.state AS status,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(wi.agent_name,''), 'lead') AS agent,
  ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, wi.started_at, NOW()) / 3600.0, 1) AS hours_in_state
FROM wms_intervals wi
JOIN workunits w ON w.id = wi.entity_id
WHERE wi.kind = 'state'
  AND wi.entity_type = 'workunit'
  AND wi.ended_at IS NULL
  AND wi.state IN ('active', 'review')
  AND wi.started_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
ORDER BY wi.started_at ASC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Stall Table — Active/Review WUs Age >24h

panels.description:
Rework and review cost as a share of total attributed phase cost per day. Rising rework tax signals quality or coordination problems.
scope: attributed spend (wms_intervals with phase + cost_usd)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(wi.started_at, $agg),
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN wi.phase = 'rework' THEN wi.cost_usd ELSE 0 END)
    / NULLIF(SUM(wi.cost_usd), 0), 1) AS rework_pct,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN wi.phase = 'review' THEN wi.cost_usd ELSE 0 END)
    / NULLIF(SUM(wi.cost_usd), 0), 1) AS review_pct,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN wi.phase IN ('rework','review') THEN wi.cost_usd ELSE 0 END)
    / NULLIF(SUM(wi.cost_usd), 0), 1) AS combined_tax_pct
FROM wms_intervals wi
WHERE wi.kind = 'state'
  AND wi.phase IS NOT NULL
  AND wi.cost_usd IS NOT NULL
  AND wi.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rework Tax — Rework + Review Share of Attributed Cost

panels.description:
Attributed cost and hours by phase for the window. Rework=orange, review=blue per color doctrine A3.
scope: attributed spend (wms_intervals with phase)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  wi.phase,
  ROUND(SUM(wi.cost_usd), 2) AS cost_usd,
  ROUND(SUM(wi.duration_ms) / 3600000.0, 1) AS hours,
  COUNT(DISTINCT wi.entity_id) AS entities
FROM wms_intervals wi
WHERE wi.kind = 'state'
  AND wi.phase IS NOT NULL
  AND wi.cost_usd IS NOT NULL
  AND wi.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY wi.phase
ORDER BY FIELD(wi.phase, 'design','build','test','review','rework','admin')

panels.title: Phase Cost Breakdown

panels.description:
Top 20 agents by cost. cache_read/msg is the context-bloat signal — heat-colored (higher = more bloated context). Agents may use multiple models; model column shows the most-used by cost.
scope: attributed spend (cost_facts joined to token_ledger)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(cf.agent_name,''), 'lead') AS agent,
  (
    SELECT tl2.model FROM token_ledger tl2
    WHERE tl2.agent_name = cf.agent_name
      AND $__timeFilter(tl2.timestamp)
    GROUP BY tl2.model ORDER BY SUM(tl2.cost_usd) DESC LIMIT 1
  ) AS model,
  COUNT(*) AS msgs,
  ROUND(SUM(cf.cost_usd), 2) AS cost,
  ROUND(SUM(cf.cost_usd) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 4) AS `$/msg`,
  ROUND(AVG(tl.output_tokens), 0) AS `output/msg`,
  ROUND(AVG(tl.cache_read_tokens), 0) AS `cache_read/msg`
FROM cost_facts cf
JOIN token_ledger tl ON tl.message_id = cf.message_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cf.timestamp)
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY cf.agent_name
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 20 Agents by Cost

panels.description:
Average cache-read tokens per message by outcome — higher values mean context is growing without pruning.
scope: attributed spend (cost_facts)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(o.title, cf.entity_id) AS outcome,
  COUNT(*) AS msgs,
  ROUND(AVG(tl.cache_read_tokens), 0) AS avg_cache_read,
  ROUND(SUM(cf.cost_usd), 2) AS cost
FROM cost_facts cf
JOIN token_ledger tl ON tl.message_id = cf.message_id
LEFT JOIN outcomes o ON o.id = cf.entity_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cf.timestamp)
  AND cf.entity_type IN ('outcome', 'project', 'goal')
  AND ('${engineer}' = 'All' OR tl.username = '${engineer}')
  AND ('${team}' = 'All' OR tl.session_id IN (SELECT session_id FROM sessions WHERE team_name = '${team}'))
GROUP BY cf.entity_id, o.title
ORDER BY avg_cache_read DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Context-Bloat Leaderboard (by Outcome)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(username,''),'(unstamped)') FROM token_ledger ORDER BY 1
list.label: Engineer

list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(username,''),'(unstamped)') FROM token_ledger ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT team_name FROM sessions WHERE team_name IS NOT NULL AND team_name != '' ORDER BY team_name
list.label: Team
list.name: team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT team_name FROM sessions WHERE team_name IS NOT NULL AND team_name != '' ORDER BY team_name

title: 03 - AI Usage & Effectiveness
